arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea entertain Ipswich Town in the Premier League this weekend as the Blues’ pursuit of a top-five finish continues. Enzo Maresca’s side are battling for Champions League football next season, with the news that England will be allocated an additional place in next season’s competition a huge boost to the teams in the chase. Chelsea […] The post Chelsea vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea willing to offer €35m for Tottenham-linked star, but Spurs have advantage in race
arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked with a move for the Atletico Madrid midfielder Johnny Cardoso at the end of the season. According to a report from Fichajes, they would be willing to offer €35 million in order to sign the 23-year-old United States international. The player has been heavily linked with a move to Tottenham Hotspur […] The post Chelsea willing to offer €35m for Tottenham-linked star, but Spurs have advantage in race appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Ipswich Town Premier League clash predicted as Champions League hunt continues
arts.sum: A heavily-rotated Chelsea side drew 0-0 against Brentford in their last Premier League outing as the Blues remained fourth in the table, but Enzo Maresca's side did return to winning ways midweek, beating Legia Warsaw 3-0 in the first leg of their Conference League quarter-final clash. Ipswich Town currently sit 19th in the Premier League table, with a 2-1 loss to Wolves last week making relegation look even more likely.

arts.ttl: 'That’s not acceptable': Tosin Adarabioyo shares one thing he’s so angry about ahead of Chelsea vs Ipswich

arts.ttl: Chelsea to scout 24-year-old star today after a recommendation from club legend
arts.sum: Chelsea have now joined the race to sign the Angers goalkeeper Yahia Fofana at the end of the season. According to football insider, they are impressed with the 24-year-old’s performances, and they are hoping to sign the Ivory Coast international in the coming weeks. Clubs like Newcastle United have scouted the goalkeeper in recent months […] The post Chelsea to scout 24-year-old star today after a recommendation from club legend appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Chelsea vs Ipswich live on TV in UK today?
arts.sum: Chelsea are aiming to record a sixth straight Premier League home win

arts.ttl: Chelsea close to Liam Delap transfer advantage as eight-word Nicolas Jackson message is telling
arts.sum: There are other options for Chelsea and at the time of writing, there is no suggestion that Delap will be the man they go for over other targets, but it looks to be one that ticks a lot of boxes. Maresca already knew it, but the Chelsea defenders will now be well aware they need to be at their best on Sunday with the 22-year-old proving to be a relentless menace in the reverse fixture - where he scored the opening goal after winning a penalty - back in late December.
